title: Implement Trie (Prefix Tree)
prompt: Implement a Trie with `insert(word)`, `search(word) -> bool` (exact match), and `startsWith(prefix) -> bool`. Inputs are op protocols of the form `[['Trie'], ['insert', w], ['search', w], ['startsWith', p], ...]`; outputs are `null` for ctor/insert and the boolean for search/startsWith.
hints: Each node has up to 26 children + an `isEnd` flag.
search(word) walks the path and returns isEnd; startsWith returns true if the path exists.
Hash-map-of-children is simpler than fixed array for sparse alphabets.

optimal.approach: Tree of nodes with children map and end flag.

pitfalls: search vs startsWith confusion: search requires isEnd=true.
